metadata.name: Update SDS Due to New Hazard Info

description: New toxicology data has become available for a raw material, requiring an update to the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) for all products containing it.

nodes.task_description: Identify all finished products that contain the specified raw material using the formulation system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a list of 15 affected products.

nodes.task_description: For the first affected product, create a new version of its SDS and update the toxicological information in Section 11.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully revises the SDS document with the new hazard data.

nodes.task_description: Trigger a workflow to have the updated SDS reviewed and approved by the EHS manager.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent submits the revised SDS into the approval workflow.
